Are you tired of looking for your items in your backpack which wastes lots of your time? Our transparent backpack is perfect for you to store your daily necessities. With size of 16.54x12.6x5.91in with two big compartments and two side pockets to meet your need. Durable clear PVC material allows to quickly check your items and for quick and easy cleaning! Widened padded straps can ease the stress on your shoulder. A must-have fashion backpack for you!

Feature：

Spacious Design: Designed with a large main compartment for your belongings, a front compartment for glasses, 2 sides mesh pocket to store your umbrellas, water bottle, drink and several small mesh pockets inside the front compartment to organize your pens and lipstick, roomy enough to store all your daily necessities with size of 16.54x12.6x5.91in.

Adjustable Padded Straps: Reinforced strap stitches are adopted to fix the strap firmly. Widened padded shoulder straps are specially designed to ease the stress on your shoulder, decreasing you fatigue while carrying the bag. And it can be adjusted from 17.32in to 29.92in to fit different figure height.

Wide Range of Uses: Perfect to be used as clear lunch bag, diaper bag, beach bag, nurse bag, transparent backpack for office workers, sport events, concerts at colleges and workplace.

Convenient & Time Saving: With transparent design, quickly check the items in your clear backpack for convenient taking out without wasting time. Keep all your valuables safe and handy at all times.

Durable Cold Resistant PVC: Made of thicker PVC material, the bag is durable and soft to bend as you need, and would not crack even in cold weather. Simple and waterproof design makes it very easy and quick to get cleaning. Simply wipe away spills, dirt, and grime with soap and water to clean with ease!

Specification：

Product Type: Heavy Duty Clear Backpack
Color: Black
Material: 0.3mm PVC
Capacity: About 20L/5.3Gal
Adjustable Shoulder Length: 44-76cm/17.32-29.92in
Side Pouch Fit For Bottle: Recommended Diameter Below 9cm/3.54in
Item Size: 42x32x15cm/16.54x12.6x5.91in
Item Weight: 494g/1.09lbs
Package Size: 47*39*3cm/18.50*15.35*1.18in
Package Weight: 535g/1.17lbs

Package Contents：


1 x Clear Backpack
